citations.narrative:
- The water bins in the wallaby enclosure had cloudy water with an excessive accumulation of debris. Dirty water bins are
a potential source of contamination to the animals. All water bins must be kept clean and sanitized to protect the welfare
of the animals.
Corrected at the time of inspection
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representative.
